positive: A minimalist, stylized celestial forest scene. Depict bioluminescent mushrooms growing on the roots of massive, graceful trees. The main subject is a serene, glowing pathway winding through the forest. Focus on strong silhouettes of the trees against a deep indigo night sky dotted with nebula clouds and crescent moons. Use a limited color palette of sapphire blue, emerald green, and ethereal gold for bioluminescence. The overall style should be contemporary flat illustration, reminiscent of graphic novel art meets nature magic. Composition should be symmetrical and centered for apparel placement. High contrast, clean lines, perfect print quality, vector art look, deep depth of field, crisp details.
